name: Loan Calculator
desc: Calculate the monthly payment for any personal or consumer loan.
seo_description: Use the free Loan Calculator to get precise results in seconds. Simply enter your measurements — no registration required.
example_label: Calculate monthly payment for 10,000 EUR at 5% for 5 years.
result_context: The cuota_mensual of {cuota_mensual} is your fixed monthly loan payment. You will pay {total_intereses} in interest over the life of the loan.
mistakes: Confusing annual interest rate with monthly rate in calculations
Not considering early repayment penalti is that may apply
Overlooking the total cost of borrowing beyond monthly payments
